entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

CLEAR, HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
